headline: Keysight Expands Photonic Design Automation Portfolio with System-Level Simulation
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., June 16, 2026--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) today announced that it completed the acquisition of VPIphotonics on June 9, 2026, adding system-level simulation to its photonic design automation portfolio and enabling optical and electrical engineers to advance designs from component to complete link within a single environment.

headline: Can Viavi's New TETRA Testing Upgrade Strengthen Its Growth Story?
summary: VIAV's new TETRA testing upgrade for the CX300 aims to speed deployments, cut costs, and reinforce its position in mission-critical radio testing.

headline: How Is Coherent's Stock Performance Compared to Other Technology Stocks
summary: Coherent has outperformed other technology stocks over the past year, and analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock's growth potential.

headline: Leverage Shares by Themes Continues Expansion of Leveraged Single Stock ETF Offering with AXTI, APH, TEL, FN, KEYS, ADI, MCHP, & TSEM
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., June 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes is pleased to announce the launch of eight new 2X single-stock leveraged ETFs, available for trading beginning June 16, 2026. Built for active traders seeking dynamic ways to engage with potentially high-growth innovators, these products are designed with the goal of helping investors amplify returns (up & down) while actively participating in the daily performance of their underlying stocks.
